title: ConsumeNotesProposalMetadata
description: Multisig proposal metadata for the consume_notes proposal type. Discriminated by metadataVersion: absent => v1 (legacy, local-store-dependent verification); 2 => v2 (self-contained verification with embedded notes). Owned by the multisig client SDKs; the Guardian server stores this as opaque payload.

V1Legacy.description: Legacy shape. Verification requires the cosigner's local Miden store to contain the referenced notes. Accepted by transitional clients (Release N) only; refused by cut-over clients (Release N+1) with consume_notes_unsupported_metadata_version.

V2SelfContained.description: Self-contained shape. Verification rebuilds the TransactionRequest from the embedded notes alone; no local-store, transport, or chain access is required.

notes.description: base64 of Miden SDK Note::to_bytes() / note.serialize(). Length and order MUST match noteIds. For each index i, Note.deserialize(base64decode(notes[i])).id() MUST equal noteIds[i]; otherwise verification fails with consume_notes_note_binding_mismatch.

NoteIdHex.description: Canonical Miden NoteId rendered as hex with 0x prefix.

SerializedNote.description: base64 encoding of Miden Note serialization bytes (Note::to_bytes() / note.serialize()).

x-error-codes.consume_notes_note_binding_mismatch: v2: notes.length !== noteIds.length, or any embedded Note.id() does not match the declared noteIds[i].
x-error-codes.consume_notes_unsupported_metadata_versi: metadataVersion is a value the client does not support (including v1 on a cut-over build).
x-error-codes.consume_notes_metadata_oversize: Serialized v2 metadata exceeds 256 KiB (MAX_CONSUME_NOTES_METADATA_BYTES). Enforced at proposal-creation time before any signature collection.
x-error-codes.consume_notes_legacy_note_missing: v1: get_input_note returned no record for at least one declared note_id. Indicates the cosigner's local Miden store does not contain the referenced note; not reachable on v2 proposals.
